response: bat tokens issued by the village totaled 240, and since each token was worth 3 pence, the combined value of all tokens amounted to 720 pence; given that the average purchase cost 18 pence, dividing the total value by the cost per purchase reveals that 40 average purchases could be made with the entire supply of tokens issued that year.
